subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God and the God of all nations, my Goal and the Goal of the world, for having manifested Thy Cause and made it to appear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی و اله الامم و مقصودی و مقصود العالم بما اظهرت امرک و ابرزت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
